creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
Created attachment 189901
Patch to update

This is a point release containing a fix for CVE-2017-15105.

A full description of this vulnerability can be found at:
https://unbound.net/downloads/CVE-2017-15105.txt

Bug fixes:
- patch for CVE-2017-15105: vulnerability in the processing of
  wildcard synthesized NSEC records.
